channel.title: AirCast Updates
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: AirCast v1.1.1
item.description:
AirCast v1.1.1 — Hotfix 🔧

  • TNT Sports Ultimate EPG: Programme info now displays correctly.
  • Foreign EPG Bleed Fix: UK channels no longer show Spanish/foreign programme data.
  • Consistent Popout Menu: Stream selection popout now appears on all channels.

item.title: AirCast v1.1.0
item.description:
AirCast v1.1.0 — Liquid Glass Edition 💎

  • Intelligent Channel Consolidation: Automatically groups regional variants into single channels.
  • Enhanced EPG Accuracy: Fixed mapping issues for TNT Sports and regional networks.
  • Liquid Glass Branding: Complete visual overhaul with premium glass aesthetics.
  • Stream UX: Added "Playing" status indicators and animated signal symbols.
  • Stability: Improved HLS loading logic for server-side rate limiting.
